title: Appellate Quarterly - May 2024
content:
## Appellate Quarterly - May 2024
Join McCarthy Tétrault’s National Appellate Litigation Group as we discuss appeals of importance to the Canadian business community during the last quarter. Each session brings you up-to-date on recent appellate developments across Canada. Topics to be discussed this quarter include:
- Ontario/Atlantic : Ontario Court of Appeal dismisses cancerphobia claim – developments in product liability and toxic torts
- Quebec : The Court of Appeal reiterates its restricted approach on preliminary motions
- Western Canada : BC Court of Appeal addresses defamation claims and anti-SLAPP law (strategic lawsuits against public participation)
- Federal : Class action certification difficulties in the Federal Courts
- Supreme Court of Canada : Judicial review is available alongside a limited right of appeal
Speakers include: Brandon Kain , James S.S. Holtom , Karine Joizil , Byron Shaw , Alexandra Cocks
Note: All instructions and information on how to access the webinar will be forwarded a few days before the event. This program qualifies for up to 1.5 hours of credit under the mandatory education regimes in British Columbia and Ontario.
Barreau du Québec Continuing Education: This program contains up to 1.5 hours of content. For more information regarding the declaration and recognition of educational activities, please contact the Barreau du Québec . For questions about this seminar, please contact clientevents@mccarthy.ca .
1:00 p.m. - 2:30 p.m. (ET) 11:00 a.m. - 12:30 p.m. (MT) 10:00 a.m. - 11:30 a.m. (PT)
